items.headline: Quintana (elbow sprain) hoping to play catch after follow-up exam

news_items.headline: Mets watch Soto depart after 4 innings vs. Rockies...
news_items.summary: The Mets' woeful season might have taken another turn for the worse Tuesday night when Juan Soto exited after four innings against the Cubs with back tightness. He is day-to-day.

news_items.headline: Twins GM: 'No plans' to deal All-Star OF Buxton
news_items.summary: The Minnesota Twins have "no plans" to deal veteran All-Star outfielder Byron Buxton, the team's general manager said on Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Stearns: Still time for Mets to contend this seaso...
news_items.summary: Mets president of baseball operations David Stearns said he views the Aug. 3 trade deadline as the "cut off" to decide whether to push for the playoffs or shift their focus to 2027.

news_items.headline: Devers apologized to Vitello: 'A misunderstanding'...
news_items.summary: Giants first baseman Rafael Devers apologized to manager Tony Vitello and said his actions at first base in the ninth inning of San Francisco's one-run loss to Miami on Sunday are being "blown out of proportion."

news_items.headline: Athletics' Gelof exits after hand spiked by cleat
news_items.summary: Athletics infielder Zack Gelof left Tuesday night's game in the second inning with a gruesome injury after the Giants' Matt Chapman stepped on Gelof's right hand during an awkward tag play at second base.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Counsell perplexed by rainout in New York
news_items.summary: After his team got rained out two days in a row, Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell sounded a little miffed about the second one in New York.

news_items.headline: Braves blow another one in 7-6 loss to Padres
news_items.summary: A wild night at Petco Park was capped off by a walk-off single by way of Manny Machado as the Braves fell to the Padres, 7-6, in 10 innings. This is a bad baseball team at the moment. The second inning was a doozy for both sides. The Braves loaded the bases and cashed in […]

news_items.headline: Sonny Gray cruises in Colorado, propels the Red Sox to a bounce back win
news_items.summary: The Red Sox rebound from perhaps their most hideous loss of the season with a much needed victory.

news_items.headline: Down to final strike, Phillies erupt with 8-RUN rally to stun Nats
Collective Exhale: Dbacks 4, Cardinals 3
news_items.summary: For the vast majority of the night, this game was trending like so many others we have grown all too familiar with this season. Starting pitcher throws a great game, bullpen does their job, but the offense just couldn’t come through with the big hit with runners in scoring position. Fortunately for the Dbacks, that […]

news_items.headline: PCA's 5th HR in past 6 games comes vs. club that dealt him to Cubs
Francisco Lindor's impending return a positive Mets desperately need right now
news_items.summary: On a lousy night at Citi Field on Tuesday, the Mets could be getting Francisco Lindor back very soon, a bright spot in what has been a tough stretch.

news_items.headline: Kodai Senga’s role back in question after another nightmare outing: ‘You have to earn it’
news_items.summary: Kodai Senga appears to be on the outside looking in at the Mets' starting rotation after yet another rough outing.
